shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Player character death state after collision with obstacle
context.screen_position: Fixed at x=100px from left edge, y=0px (ground level)
context.usage_scenario: Displayed when player collides with any obstacle, triggers game over state, all movement stops

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex dinosaur in defeated pose with eyes closed or X-shaped
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art, hard edges, no gradients

animation.description: Single static frame displayed indefinitely until game restart

visual_specification.details: Eyes closed or replaced with X symbols (optional), body slumped or neutral standing pose, conveys defeat clearly

relationships.shared_with: Same dimensions as player_run, player_idle, player_jump. Same color scheme as all player states
relationships.differences_from: All other player states have open eyes. player_run and player_idle are animated. player_duck has different dimensions (118x60px)

explicit_negations: No transparency except full alpha channel
